names.zh: 老官山一勾多综提花织机

era.zh: 西汉约公元前157至88年；2013年出土于成都老官山M2墓
era.en: Western Han, about 157–88 BCE; excavated in 2013 from Laoguanshan tomb M2, Chengdu

oneLiner.zh: 把图案写进综片升降次序的可编程织机。
oneLiner.en: A programmable loom that writes the pattern into the heddle-lift sequence.

principle.zh: 踏板与一勾多综选择器按预定次序升降综片，把纹样固定成一套程序；更换综序就能织出不同图案。
principle.en: Treadles and a single-hook multi-heddle selector raise the heddles in a stored sequence, turning a pattern into a physical program that changes when the heddle order changes.

sources.quote: 霍光妻遺淳于衍蒲桃錦二十四匹、散花綾二十五匹。綾出鉅鹿陳寶光家，寶光妻傳其法……機用一百二十鑷，六十日成一匹，匹直萬錢。

translation.zh: 霍光妻子赠送葡萄锦二十四匹、散花绫二十五匹。绫出自巨鹿陈宝光家，其妻传下织法；织机用一百二十镊，六十天织成一匹，价值一万钱。
translation.en: Huo Guang's wife gave 24 bolts of grape brocade and 25 of scattered-flower damask. The method came through Chen Baoguang's wife; the loom used 120 selectors, took 60 days per bolt, and each bolt was worth ten thousand cash.

sources.quote: 舊綾機五十綜者五十躡，六十綜者六十躡，先生患其喪功費日，乃皆易以十二躡。

translation.zh: 旧绫机有五十综就配五十蹑，有六十综就配六十蹑。马钧认为费工费时，把它们都改成十二蹑。
translation.en: Older damask looms used 50 treadles for 50 heddles or 60 for 60. Ma Jun found this wasteful and reduced both arrangements to 12 treadles.

sources.book: 中国丝绸博物馆老官山织机复原研究
sources.quote: M2北底箱出土四部织机模型，由竹木构成，结构复杂、清楚，部件上残存有丝线和染料，是参照原织机制作的缩小模型……其中一部织机（编号186）略大，尺寸是：长85、宽26、高50cm，其他三部（189、190、191）连杆型略小：长63、宽19、高37cm

translation.zh: 二号墓北底箱出土四部按原织机缩制的竹木织机模型，部件上残留丝线和染料；186号长85厘米、宽26厘米、高50厘米，189、190、191号连杆型长63厘米、宽19厘米、高37厘米。
translation.en: Four scaled bamboo-and-wood loom models based on full-size machines were excavated from Tomb No. 2, with surviving silk and pigment. No. 186 measures 85 by 26 by 50 cm; linkage models Nos. 189, 190, and 191 measure 63 by 19 by 37 cm.

dimensions.basis: 按中国丝绸博物馆工作复原推测

scholar.zh: 中国丝绸博物馆复原团队
scholar.en: China National Silk Museum reconstruction team

summary.zh: 按186号模型复原的滑框式织机。
summary.en: A sliding-frame loom reconstructed from model no. 186.

evidence.zh: 工作复原成功织出交龙对凤纹锦。
evidence.en: The working reconstruction wove the intertwined-dragon and paired-phoenix brocade.

scholar.zh: 中国丝绸博物馆复原团队
scholar.en: China National Silk Museum reconstruction team

summary.zh: 按189、190、191号模型复原的连杆式织机。
summary.en: A linkage loom reconstructed from models 189, 190, and 191.

evidence.zh: 复原织出“世毋极”锦，并在2018年用同一程序复织“五星出东方利中国”锦。
evidence.en: The reconstruction wove the Shi Wu Ji brocade and in 2018 reproduced the Five Stars Rise in the East brocade with the same program.

detail.zh: 展项只驱动8片代表性综片，真实织机有数十片；这是明确声明的演示简化。
detail.en: The exhibit drives eight representative heddles, while real machines carried dozens; this is a declared demonstration simplification.

exhibit.zh: 4件出土织机模型，常设核心藏品
exhibit.en: The four excavated loom models, permanent signature holdings

exhibit.zh: 全尺寸可运行复原与织造演示
exhibit.en: Full-size working reconstructions and weaving demonstrations

name.en: Chengdu Shu Brocade and Embroidery Museum

exhibit.en: Shu brocade looms and weaving display

images.title: Laoguanshan excavated Han loom
images.sourceUrl: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:成都老官山墓地出土-织机-西汉-成都考古中心_2024-10-17.jpg
images.author: Kcx36
images.attributionText: Kcx36, CC BY-SA 4.0, via Wikimedia Commons

hook.zh: 把图案写进机器：综片升降顺序就是程序，程序与织出的数据在实体机械中分离。
hook.en: Write the picture into the machine: the heddle lift order is the program, physically separating program from woven data.

demo.zh: 交互调整8片综的顺序，让同一台织机现场织出两种对比纹样。
demo.en: Interactively reorder eight heddles so the same loom weaves two contrasting patterns live.

echo.zh: 提花机通向雅卡尔穿孔卡、巴贝奇，再通向存储程序。
echo.en: The pattern loom leads to Jacquard cards, Babbage, and the stored program.
